channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Urgent action needed - hygiene and safety concern Public Urination– Dalston Square Bus Stop, 2nd April
item.description:
People are repeatedly urinating outside our flats despite this being raised before. Tonight, a group of 5 individuals stopped & urinated at the same time, which was extremely distressing. The smell is overpowering and we cannot open our windows.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsland Road, Dalston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near the car park hates, 2nd April
item.description:
Someone left them her but i dont know who did

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Padua Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Freezer, 2nd April
item.description:
What appears to be freezer or similar dumped on pavement opposite Emmanuel church hall
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hadlow Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sack, 2nd April
item.description:
Black sack of what looks like clothing on pavement opposite 7 Birkbeck Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes on roadabout section, 2nd April
item.description:
Multiple pot holes please arrange to inspect the section of road and repair.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A223, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing road markings and new pot holes, 2nd April
item.description:
Missed big markings are seriously dangerous to pedestrians, Cyclists and Motorists

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 200, Stroud Green Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and chair dumped, 2nd April
item.description:
Mattress and chair dumped on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whittington Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped, 2nd April
item.description:
More bags of rubbish dumped by bins. This ends up polluting the New River

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whittington Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fading double yellow lines encouraging dangerous illegal parking, 2nd April
item.description:
The double yellow lines are starting to fade and so are being ignored by itinerant ice cream vendors. This is causing pedestrians to have to walk onto a main road to cross over to the other side of King William Walk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): King William Walk, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various fly-tipped items, 2nd April
item.description:
- Under railway bridge, several broken chairs - Opposite no. 75, dumped steel trolley - Outside no. 77, dumped leather sofa - Outside no. 78, broken wheel and shoes & clothing - Outside no. 90, dumped broken armchair
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Torbay Road near Tesco, 2nd April
item.description:
Lots of rubbish on Torbay Road on pavement and street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Zipline, 2nd April
item.description:
My sister recently went to the Erith Recreation Ground Playground and she informed me that the zipline is broken. The zipline is her favourite part of the playground and I would really appreciate if the zipline could be fixed. Not just for my sister but also for other children to be able to play with.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thanet Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is no road, the whole thing is a problem, 2nd April
item.description:
The road is completely messed up, you can’t drive there, the whole road is a big pothole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westgate Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 2nd April
item.description:
This vehicle has been left in our parking area for weeks. It is not taxed or MOTd.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crosslet Vale, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anerley Hill SE19 within a coupl, 2nd April
item.description:
Anerley Hill SE19 within a couple of yards of streetlight column ID number 4 (close to property number 6) is a square black plastic footpath litter bin which is graffiti tagged. Google Streetview link: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.4197791,-0.0773775,3a,75y,184.13h,84.02t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1scBF-6Ewh0ZgZFeqFnDU4Gw!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D5.978579544880773%26panoid%3DcBF-6Ewh0ZgZFeqFnDU4Gw%26yaw%3D184.13027369871196!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDQwMS4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anerley Road SE20 number 115 (disuse, 2nd April
item.description:
Anerley Road SE20 number 115 (disused shop – ex Co-op shop) dark grey metal shutters graffiti tagged.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anerley Road SE20 number 113 dark, 2nd April
item.description:
Anerley Road SE20 number 113 dark grey plaster wall graffiti tagged (in black).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Crystal Palace Park Road SE26 opposite s, 2nd April
item.description:
Crystal Palace Park Road SE26 opposite side of the road to house number 56 a green footpath box is graffiti tagged.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Furniture left, 2nd April
item.description:
Furniture left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunlop Place, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree growing over the back of our garage is causing a lot of damage to mine and other neighbours garages and is also a really unpleasant sight when looking out my rear windows and back doors., 2nd April
item.description:
This tree i can imagine has been here for quite a few years and looks like it desperately needs pruning right back due to the damage it’s causing on the garage roofs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gattons Way, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
